Interface ITiePointOperation2

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to members that control an image tie point collection.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("EF4C3680-BADD-4917-A6DE-6D52F839D110")]
public interface ITiePointOperation2 : ITiePointOperation

Properties

Resolution

The tie point resolution.

double Resolution { get; set; }

double
